description: Weekly competitive-intel digest. Searches the web for mentions of configured topics, dedupes and clusters by source domain, and upserts a single GitHub issue per ISO week.

WEEKLY_DIGEST_TOPICS.description: Comma-separated list of topics the agent searches for each week.

WEEKLY_DIGEST_REPO.description: GitHub repo to upsert the digest issue into; format "owner/repo".

best.systemPrompt: Research the configured topics and produce a clustered weekly digest.

best-value.systemPrompt: Research the configured topics and produce a clustered weekly digest.

minimum.systemPrompt: Research the configured topics and produce a clustered weekly digest.
